title: Compile problem.
body:
Hello, I've used iverilog few years on my MacBook Pro. Suddenly I cant't compile it anymore??  
What I did.  
```

  793  git clone git://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog.git
  794  cd iverilog/
  795  sh autoconf.sh
  796  ./configure
  797  make
  798  history

```
Got this.
```
g++ -I. -I.. -I../libmisc  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow   -g -O2 -MD -c vtype_stream.cc -o vtype_stream.o
mv vtype_stream.d dep/vtype_stream.d
flex -s -olexor.cc ./lexor.lex
bison --verbose -t -d -o parse.cc parse.y
parse.y:2.9-16: syntax error, unexpected identifier, expecting string
make[1]: *** [parse.cc] Error 1
make: *** [all] Error 2

```
Then I tried this.  

`bison --verbose -t -d -o parse.cc parse.y
`
And make again.

```

make
mv parse.cc.h parse.h 2>/dev/null || mv parse.hh parse.h
touch parse.h
g++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -Ilibmisc  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow   -g -O2 -MD -c lexor.cc -o lexor.o
lexor.lex:249:17: error: use of undeclared identifier 'VLlval'; did you mean 'yylval'?
                yylval.text = yytext_string_filter(VLtext, VLleng);
                ^~~~~~
                yylval
lexor.lex:41:17: note: expanded from macro 'yylval'
# define yylval VLlval
                ^
parse.hh:967:16: note: 'yylval' declared here
extern YYSTYPE yylval;
               ^

```
code_blocks:
make
mv parse.cc.h parse.h 2>/dev/null || mv parse.hh parse.h
touch parse.h
g++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -Ilibmisc  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow   -g -O2 -MD -c lexor.cc -o lexor.o
lexor.lex:249:17: error: use of undeclared identifier 'VLlval'; did you mean 'yylval'?
                yylval.text = yytext_string_filter(VLtext, VLleng);
                ^~~~~~
                yylval
lexor.lex:41:17: note: expanded from macro 'yylval'
# define yylval VLlval
                ^
parse.hh:967:16: note: 'yylval' declared here
extern YYSTYPE yylval;
               ^
